phase0_findings: GOVERNANCE_DOC_ONLY where rules have no hook or CI enforcement
APPLY_NOT_WIRED for DRY_RUN scripts without APPLY counterparts
DOC_ONLY for future automation claims represented only in docs

notes: Gate is in pending_review state. Does not authorize APPLY.
To authorize APPLY: assign packet_id, set approval_status to approved_for_apply, set approved_by_human to true.
APPLY requires explicit human approval before execution.
Commit requires clean validation and an exact-file commit package.
No live trading, broker, OANDA, API key, webhook, or real order action is allowed.

approval_inbox.next_action: Use automation/orchestration/approval_inbox/ as the active approval authority and treat other approval surfaces as evidence/projection unless separately promoted by Human Owner.
notes: This active inbox restores the canonical approval authority file named by source-of-truth governance.
Human Owner remains final approval authority for APPLY, commit, push, merge, protected actions, runtime mutation, and safety overrides.
Relay, Operation Glue, telemetry, Night Supervisor, Autonomy Bridge, and dashboard outputs are evidence or projection surfaces only.
Validator output is evidence only and does not approve APPLY, commit, push, merge, PR creation, runtime mutation, trading, broker, OANDA, API key, secret, or scheduled-task actions.
This record does not authorize future APPLY work. Future APPLY packets require exact-scope Human Owner approval.

blocked_sample.safe_next_command: Do not apply. Repair approval packet.

phase2.safe_next_action: Use approval compressor as a validator, not as authority.

valid_sample.safe_next_command: Run scoped APPLY command, then stop before commit or push.

recommendations.problem: Approval evidence exists in multiple places and needs a local schema validator before promotion.
recommendations.safe_next_prompt: Packet draft required: validate approval inbox schema without mutating approvals.
recommendations.title: Add approval inbox schema validator

recommendations.problem: Validators are discoverable but not yet enforced by a single local command.
recommendations.safe_next_prompt: Packet draft required: connect validator registry evidence to bridge status only.
recommendations.title: Wire validator registry into bridge status

recommendations.problem: Any live broker execution path remains production/live and is blocked.
recommendations.safe_next_prompt: No execution packet recommended for live broker work.
recommendations.title: Keep live broker execution blocked

phase4.safe_next_action: Review recommendations; do not execute them automatically.
